TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. JURY TRIAL CONT'D. FURTHER ARGUMENT AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND SWORN AS TO THEIR QUALIFICATIONS. PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES EXERCISED BY BOTH SIDES. 12 JURORS AND 2 ALTERNATES SWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. PLTF'S CASE COMMENCED WITH CALLING OF FIRST WITNESS. JURY TRIAL CONT'D TO 5-15-96 AT 9:00AM FOR COUNSEL AND 9:30AM FOR JURY.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-16-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT KRIEGER, AISHA O'DONNELL, PATRICK

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED. ATNY PETER HADIARIS PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNY KATE KARDOS-POLEVOI PRESENT WITH DEFT AISHA KRIEGER. FURTHER ORAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED. DEFENSE RESTS. PLTF PRESENTS NO REBUTTAL EVIDENCE. EVIDENCE IS CONCLUDED. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY COUNSEL. COURT INFORMS JURY THAT BY STIPULATION THEY ARE RELEIVED FROM CONSIDERATION OF SECOND NAMED DEFT, PATRICK O'DONNELL. PARTIES STIPULATE TO WAIVE REPORTING OF ARGUMENT AND INSTRUCTION. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF JURY DURING DELIBERATIONS AND JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. JURY RETURNS TO COURTROOM WITH VERDICT: JURY FINDS DEFT AISHA KREIGER NEGLIGENT, BUT FINDS THAT NEGLIGENCE WAS NOT A CAUSE OF INJURY TO PLTF AND NO DAMAGES ARE AWARDED. BOTH SIDES WAIVE POLLING OF JURY. JURORS THANKED AND EXCUSED; ADMONISHMENT LIFTED. DEFT TO PREPARE JUDGMNT. DEFT EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED; PLTF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED.
